title: Thooliyilae Lyrics Chinna Thambi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
thooliyilae aada vandha
vaanathu min vilakkae
aaliyilae kandeduththa
arputha aani muththae

thottil melae
muththu maala
vanna poovaa vilaiyaada
chinna thambi esappaada

thooliyilae aada vandha
vaanathu min vilakkae
aaliyilae kandeduththa
arputha aani muththae

paatteduthu naan padichchaa
paattaruvi kannurangum
patta maram poo malarum
paarayilum neer surakkum

raagam enna thaalam enna
arinjaa naan padichen
aezhu katta ettu katta
therinja naan padichaen

naan padachcha niyanamellaam
yaar koduththaa saamithaan
aededuthu padichadhilla
saatchi indha boomi thaan

thottil melae
muththu maala
vanna poovaa vilaiyaada
chinna thambi esappaada

soru poda thaayirukkaa
pattiniya paaththa dhilla
thaai irukkum kaaranathaal
koyilum ponadhilla

thaai adichi valichchadhilla
irundhum naan azhuven
naan azhudhaa thaangiduma
udanae thaai azhuvaa

aaga moththam thaai manasu
pol nadakkum pilla thaan
vaalugira vazhkayila
tholvigalae illathaan

thottil melae
muththu maala
vanna poovaa vilaiyaada
chinna thambi esappaada

thooliyilae aada vandha
vaanathu min vilakkae
aaliyilae kandeduththa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thooliyilae?

The song conveys themes of love and beauty, reflecting the emotions of longing and affection.

What is the plot context of the movie Chinna Thambi?

The movie revolves around the life of a simple man and his romantic adventures, showcasing the ups and downs of love.

Who is the singer of Thooliyilae?

The song is sung by Mano, known for his melodious voice in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for Chinna Thambi?

The music for the movie was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Thooliyilae released?

The song was released on April 12, 1991.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thooliyilae, the protagonist expresses his deep affection and admiration for his beloved, set against the backdrop of the movie Chinna Thambi. The song's melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a favorite among romantic ballads. The lyrics, penned by Vaali, beautifully articulate the emotions of love and longing. Overall, this song remains a cherished piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thooliyilae from the enchanting Chinna Thambi captures the essence of romance with its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics. The collaboration of Mano's soulful voice and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition creates a timeless classic that resonates with listeners. Dive into this nostalgic journey that beautifully encapsulates love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: In the cradle, the shining star has come, revealing a wonderful pearl-like wonder.
On the swing, a garland of pearls and colorful flowers plays, little brother, sing along.
In the cradle, the shining star has come, revealing a wonderful pearl-like wonder.
When I sing a song, the trees will sway, flowers will bloom, and water will flow.
What is melody, what is rhythm? I learned it, and I know how to play it well.
I learned the rules, who gave them? I didn't learn them from anyone; this earth is my witness.
On the swing, a garland of pearls and colorful flowers plays, little brother, sing along.
Food is served, is there yogurt? The mother will be there, that's why the temple is not golden.
Even if the mother hits, I won't cry; if I cry, will the mother stop crying immediately?
So, the child walks with a heart like a mother; in life, there are no obstacles.
On the swing, a garland of pearls and colorful flowers plays, little brother, sing along.
In the cradle, the shining star has come, revealing a wonderful pearl-like wonder.
On the swing, a garland of pearls and colorful flowers plays, little brother, sing along.
